originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging Masking in Experience Buffer and Optimizing Action Sampling
summary: Worked on handling agent death masking in the experience buffer, concluding to defer implementation. Merged a large environment PR for Impulse Wars. Optimized action sampling by refactoring multinomial code, achieving up to 2.7 million steps per second on Neural MMO.
